securityRoom.title: Security Room
securityRoom.description: The room where the security devices will be placed.

alertTimeout.title: Alert Timeout
alertTimeout.description: The timeout duration in seconds for alerts. Set 0 to disable automatic reset.

useSetters.title: Use Setters
useSetters.description: Enable the setters devices. This will create a device for each mode that can be used to trigger the mode change when the controller doesn't allow to lock unlock doors from presence automations.

useSwitch.title: Use Switch
useSwitch.description: Enable the switch device types for the trigger. Don't use it with Alexa cause it doesn't support the switch type.

debug.title: Enable Debug
debug.description: Enable the debug for the plugin (development only)

unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)
